reviews.review_description:
I wasn't expecting much when I bought this game, was mostly just strangely attracted to the interesting graphics, but I gotta say I'm pleasantly surprised.

Shooting goblins is actually quite satisfying. Placing traps also works well. The scenery and music work well and really bring out a sense of mystery.

It gets challenging in later levels. It would be better if the enemies types have more differentiation. Now, we just need more level.

Definitely has potential. Please keep up the good work and give us more updates.
